hierarchy.h1: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-display uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-50
hierarchy.data: text-2xl font-bold font-body tracking-tight text-white tabular-nums

layout_and_spacing.global_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-slate-50 relative pb-20 shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden border-x border-slate-900
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Grid Mode B: Control Room (Mobile Adapted). Dense. Use flex-col with gap-3 or grid-cols-2 with gap-3 for side-by-side metrics.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for main containers, rounded-lg for cards, rounded-md for inner elements, rounded-full for indicators.

bottom_navigation.wrapper: fixed bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-md bg-slate-950/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-800 flex justify-around items-center px-2 py-3 z-50
bottom_navigation.item_inactive: text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-400 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center gap-1
bottom_navigation.label: text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase

cards.base: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg
cards.interactive: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform cursor-pointer
cards.header: flex justify-between items-center p-3 border-b border-slate-800/50 bg-slate-800/20

badges.green: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.yellow: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.orange: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-500 border border-orange-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.red: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.blue: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-500 border border-blue-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.purple: px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-400 border border-violet-500/30 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

buttons.primary: w-full py-3 px-4 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-white text-slate-900 rounded-lg font-bold tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-all
buttons.danger: w-full py-3 px-4 bg-red-500/10 hover:bg-red-500/20 text-red-500 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg font-bold tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-all
buttons.outline: w-full py-3 px-4 bg-transparent border border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg font-bold tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use grain/noise overlays sparingly. The dark mode should feel deep, unlit, and focused, like an aviation radar screen.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle colored box-shadows on active states or critical alerts (e.g., a glowing red dot for escalated actions).
visual_enhancers.tactical_lines: Divide sections with 1px solid borders (`border-slate-800`). Avoid large empty spaces; everything should feel intentionally compartmentalized.

logo_abstract.description: Abstract 3D floating cube for ArchePersona branding on the Login Screen.

texture_bg.description: Dark tactical metal grid. Use at low opacity (10-15%) with mix-blend-overlay on the login screen background.

avatar_operator.description: Operator profile picture for the top navigation or settings.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The prompt requests a React Native Expo app, but if executing as a React Web codebase, you MUST enforce a mobile-only layout by wrapping the main routing/App component in a centered container (`max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-slate-950 relative overflow-x-hidden shadow-2xl`). The app should look exactly like a mobile phone screen resting in the center of the browser.
Embrace the 'Control Room' identity: Use dense information packing. No excessive whitespace. Information should be immediate, like looking at an aviation console.
Implement the Bottom Sheet / HITL Modal using a slide-up animation or an absolute positioned div anchored to the bottom inside the `max-w-md` container.

Apply specific status colors as requested: Green (Approved), Yellow (Held), Orange (Escalated), Red (Denied), Blue (Informational), Purple (COST BOSS). Use these strictly for semantic meaning, not decoration.
All interactive elements and key text MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="v-hold-tab"`).
Inject the Google Fonts `<link>` dynamically or in the `index.html`. Apply `'Audiowide'` to the CONTROL TOWER wordmark and `'Manrope'` to everything else.
Ensure 'Character + Consequence = Trust' is displayed prominently as a microcopy motto on the Login or Dashboard.
Build the dashboard as a 4-layer summary stack (V-HOLD, COST BOSS, POLICY PRIMER, TRUST LADDER). Each card should be distinct in color (referencing its domain) and highly tappable.
